raw.description: Source age string, e.g. '18 Years'. None when the bound is absent.

years.description: Age normalized to years for numeric comparison. None means 'no constraint' — never treat as 0.

demographics.description: Patient-level facts: age, sex, (and birthdate for Synthea).

documents.description: The searchable evidence units for this patient.

patient_id.description: Stable identifier for one patient (one prescreening example).

snapshot_date.description: As-of date. Retrieval/judging may only use documents dated on or before this (leakage-free eval). None for case reports.

source.description: Which public source this corpus came from.

structured.description: Machine-parsed facts (code, description, value, unit) for deterministic threshold checks.

text.description: Human-readable rendering the retriever indexes and the judge cites.

accepts_healthy_volunteers.description: Whether healthy volunteers may enroll. None when unstated.

eligibility_text.description: Verbatim inclusion/exclusion block — the raw model input the atomizer will later split into criteria.

maximum_age.description: Upper age bound; commonly open-ended (years None).

metadata.description: Extra provenance (org study id, status-verified date, keywords).

minimum_age.description: Lower age bound (raw string + normalized years).

phase.description: Trial phase. None when unspecified (e.g. observational studies).

recruitment_status.description: Overall recruitment status at record time.

source.description: Origin of the record; always 'clinicaltrials_gov' for trials.

std_ages.description: Standardized age groups the trial accepts.

conflicting_evidence.plain: The record contains evidence pointing in incompatible directions.

not_applicable.plain: The criterion does not apply to this patient/case.

not_met.plain: The patient does not satisfy this criterion.

unknown.plain: Available records do not support a definite call; this is the safe default.

blocking_criterion_recall.plain: Fraction of gold blocking criteria predicted as blocking.

criterion_macro_f1.plain: Unweighted mean F1 across labels present in gold or prediction.

evidence_support_accuracy.plain: Among met/not_met predictions, the fraction backed by present verbatim evidence.

fabricated_quote_count.plain: Number of cited quotes not found verbatim in the cited document.

patient_level_metrics.plain: Case-level diagnostics for overall recommendation labels, including accuracy, per-class scores, and confusion counts.

per_criterion_metrics.plain: Per-criterion aggregate diagnostics across the split, including support, overall accuracy, and safety-failure counts.

schema_valid_rate.plain: Fraction of submitted case packets passing schema validation.

score.plain: Weighted summary score after hard-gate penalties.

unsafe_clearance_rate.plain: Rate of clearing a possibly disqualifying criterion.

unsupported_decision_count.plain: Number of definite met/not_met predictions without required evidence.

primer.biostats_reading: Macro-F1 treats each prediction label evenly, while safety gates prevent averaging away clinically risky errors.
primer.eligibility_criteria: Clinical-trial criteria are split into inclusion requirements and exclusion disqualifiers. Prescreening produces a review packet, not an enrollment decision.
primer.evidence_grounding: Definite calls must cite patient evidence. Unknown is preferable to unsupported clearance.

likely_ineligible.plain: At least one blocking criterion appears present.

needs_review.plain: Human review is needed before any screening decision.

potentially_eligible.plain: No known blocking criterion was found.
